failure_modes.cause: Current BPR is set to 5.0 bar, but 201.2 bar is required
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle at least 201.2 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: High flow rate and small diameter lead to high dP
failure_modes.mitigation: Optimize flow rate and reactor diameter to reduce pressure drop

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Test upgraded BPR at 201.2 bar with solvent flow for 60 min; monitor for pressure stability
Run blank solvent at T=120°C and Q=10.96701 mL/min for 60 min; monitor for cavitation signs
Measure pressure drop across reactor at various flow rates to validate dP predictions
